description: Style NoteGive your wardrobe a fashionable edge with these lounge pants from jockey. The soft fabric keeps you comfortable all day long. Team them with a stylish tee and sports shoes for a look that's effortlessly comfortable. Product DetailsGrey lounge pants that have an elasticated waistband with a drawstring for a customised Fit, contrast blue piping along the sides wih insert pockets for that sporty look, print on the left thigh and relaxed fit for ease of movementMaterial and CareCottonMachine wash delicate inside out at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRelaxed fitThe model (height 5'8" waist 28") is wearing a size 28
